header_info.title: Global Iron and Steel Tracker, March 2026 (V1)
header_info.citation: Recommended citation: "Global Energy Monitor, Global Iron and Steel Tracker, March 2026 (V1) release." (See the CC license for attribution requirements if sharing or adapting the data set: https://globalenergymonitor.org/creative-commons-public-license/)
header_info.contact: Contacts: Astrid Grigsby-Schulte, Steel Project Manager, astrid.grigsby-schulte@globalenergymonitor.org,  Caitlin Swalec, Heavy Industry Program Director, caitlin.swalec@globalenergymonitor.org

entries.name: BF
entries.definition: Blast furnace

entries.name: BOF
entries.definition: Basic oxygen furnace

entries.name: DRI
entries.definition: Direct reduced iron

entries.name: EAF
entries.definition: Electric arc furnace

entries.name: HBI
entries.definition: Hot briquetted iron

entries.name: IF
entries.definition: Induction furnace

entries.name: mtpa
entries.definition: million tonnes per annum

entries.name: OHF
entries.definition: Open hearth furnace

entries.name: ttpa
entries.definition: thousand tonnes per annum

entries.name: Capacity
entries.definition: Capacity is the tonnes of crude iron per annum that a steel unit is capable of producing.

entries.name: Production
entries.definition: Production is only captured at the plant-level. See the "Plant-level data" document.

entries.name: Note
entries.definition: Additional information about the research method and estimations of capacity and production are available on the GEM website at https://globalenergymonitor.org/projects/global-iron-and-steel-tracker/methodology/

entries.name: Announced
entries.definition: Capacity that has been announced in corporate or governmental planning documents, but has not begun construction.

entries.name: Construction
entries.definition: Physical furnace structure building has begun.

entries.name: Operating
entries.definition: Furnace(s) is currently operating and producing iron or steel.

entries.name: Operating pre-retirement
entries.definition: Company has announced plans to retire this iron or steelmaking capacity but it has not yet ceased operations.

entries.name: Mothballed
entries.definition: Iron or steelmaking has been idled such that it cannot be brought into operation immediately, but is not retired.

entries.name: Mothballed pre-retirement
entries.definition: Iron or steelmaking has been idled such that it cannot be brought into operation immediately. It has not yet been permanently retired/decommissioned, but the plant has announced plans to do so in the future.

entries.name: Retired
entries.definition: Furnace has ceased operations and no longer has ability to produce iron or steel. If the capacity has been mothballed for over 5 years it is considered retired.

entries.name: Cancelled
entries.definition: Capacity previously planned or under development that has been cancelled. If no progress or announcements for announced capacity are made after 5 years it is considered to be cancelled.

entries.name: GEM plant ID
entries.definition: A unique GEM identifier is assigned to each plant. Uses format P10000012XXXX where P stands for "plant", and XXXX increases with every new plant added to the GIST.

entries.name: GEM unit ID
entries.definition: A unique GEM identifier is assigned to each electric arc furnace unit. Uses format U10000014XXXX where U stands for "unit", and XXXX increases with every new unit added to the tracker.

entries.name: Unit name
entries.definition: If the furnace has a unit name (may be a letter or number) assigned to it. "unknown" indicates that the unit has no known name and the number has been assigned by GEM.

entries.name: GEM wiki page
entries.definition: Link to GEM wiki page.

entries.name: Country/area
entries.definition: Country or territory.

entries.name: Unit status
entries.definition: Operating status of the electric arc furnace. Categories are "announced", "construction", "operating", "operating pre-retirement", "mothballed", "mothballed pre-retirement", "cancelled", and "retired".

entries.name: Announced date
entries.definition: Date of announcement/proposal of electric arc furnace in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

entries.name: Construction date
entries.definition: Date that construction on the electric arc furnace began in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

entries.name: Start date
entries.definition: Date that electric arc furnace began producing steel in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

entries.name: Unit age
entries.definition: Age of electric arc furnace in years.

entries.name: Pre-retirement announcement date
entries.definition: Date the company announced its plans to retire the electric arc furnace in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

entries.name: Idled date
entries.definition: Date that electric arc furnace stops steel production, but has not been disassembled or permanently closed, in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

entries.name: Retired date
entries.definition: Date that electric arc furnace was permanently closed, either after being disassembled or after a period of inactivity (after 5 years of “mothballed”), in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

entries.name: Furnace manufacturer
entries.definition: The company that manufactured the unit, if known.

entries.name: Furnace model
entries.definition: The specific model of the unit, if known.

entries.name: Current capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: Production capacity of unit in thousands of metric tonnes per annum.

entries.name: Current size (tonnes)
entries.definition: The size of the unit in tonnes, or the amount of liquid steel it can process per batch.

entries.name: Scrap-based
entries.definition: yes or "no" to indicate whether the unit typically operates with some amount of scrap as charge.

entries.name: % scrap
entries.definition: The typical percent EAF feedstock that is supplied as scrap metal.

entries.name: % DRI
entries.definition: The typical percent EAF feedstock that is supplied as DRI.

entries.name: % HBI
entries.definition: The typical percent EAF feedstock that is supplied as HBI.

entries.name: % sponge iron (unknown if DRI or HBI)
entries.definition: The typical percent EAF feedstock that is supplied as sponge iron that has not been specified as either DRI or HBI.

entries.name: % basic/merchant pig iron
entries.definition: The typical percent EAF feedstock that is supplied as basic/merchant pig iron.

entries.name: % granulated pig iron
entries.definition: The typical percent EAF feedstock that is supplied as granulated pig iron.

entries.name: % pig iron (unknown if basic/merchant or granulated)
entries.definition: The typical percent EAF feedstock that is supplied as pig iron that has not been specified as either basic/merchant pig iron or granulated pig iron.

entries.name: % other iron
entries.definition: The typical percent EAF feedstock that is supplied as another unspecified iron source.

entries.name: % known total
entries.definition: The sum of all feedstocks used in the unit; the total of the fields % scrap, % DRI, % HBI, % sponge iron (unknown if DRI or HBI), % basic/merchant pig iron, % granulated pig iron, % pig iron (unknown if basic/merchant pig iron or granulated pig iron), and % other iron will add to 100%. If no data is available, they will add to 0%.

entries.name: GEM plant ID
entries.definition: A unique GEM identifier is assigned to each plant. Uses format P10000012XXXX where P stands for "plant", and XXXX increases with every new plant added to the GIST.

entries.name: Furnace manufacturer
entries.definition: The company that manufactured the unit, if known.

entries.name: Furnace model

entries.definition: Production capacity of unit in thousands of metric tonnes per annum.

entries.name: Current size
entries.definition: The size of the unit, in volume or load size.

entries.name: Current size unit
entries.definition: The unit of measurement used for "current size". Options are tonnes and m3.
